betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6ICF Laser Turbocharger§f boosts laser output for more efficient §bInertial Confinement Fusion§f.

§eFunction:§f
• Increases compression power of ICF Lasers
• More efficient fusion ignition
• Higher energy yields

§eUsage:§f
• Connect to ICF Laser system
• Enhances overall fusion efficiency
• Required for maximum ICF output

§aTip:§f Essential upgrade for ICF systems to achieve optimal fusion performance.
